seo-audit.evidence: OnboardFunnel.tsx has Helmet with title 'Onboarding — Socelle Professional Intelligence' and meta description. Route /onboard is public.

live-demo-detector.evidence: Signal Match step (step 3) displays DEMO badge (text-signal-warn bg-signal-warn/10). No fake-live metrics; match list is static and labeled DEMO.

cta-validator.evidence: Identity: primary CTA 'Continue'. Shadow: primary CTA per question advances. Signal Match: 'Continue to access'. Gate: 'Request access'→/request-access, 'Skip to Intelligence'→/intelligence, 'View plans'→/plans. No dead ends.

hub-shell-detector.evidence: OnboardFunnel has forms, buttons, useState, sessionStorage persistence, multi-step flow. Classified as LIVE (interactive funnel; no DB required per WO scope).

onboarding-flow-tester.evidence: 4-step funnel at /onboard: Identity Scan → Shadow Audit → Signal Match → Gate. Progress in sessionStorage (socelle_onboard). Request access and /intelligence exits wired.
